title: Mace Booster
description: A simple mod that teleports you just high enough to triggern the mace!
body:
# Mace Boost

The mace boost mod adds a New enchantment for the mace: the Boost.
This enchantment can't be aqquired trough the enchantment table but only trough trading or looting chests.

## How it works

The Boost enchantment has five levels. The higher the level, the bigger the boost.
At level one 3 blocks, at level five 15 blocks.
